title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Wano Citizens, Unknown person #5, Roger, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Toki as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wanna meet that "WA/7ey-CHAN" one more time before I bite the dust.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Is IZOU going back to Wano too?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He is part of their family now. Tell him to take care of whitey-chan for me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Guahaha, alright then!

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: Roger gave "Dark King" Rayleigh, his first mate, a few words along the way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Then he departed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He had been given a lot of medicine from the ship's doctor, Crocus.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Although, his illness was already beyond curing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There should be no tears.

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: The men of the pirate King's crew...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Do not cry!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Land of Wano, Coast

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The following performance

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What an impressive mess...

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: ...and just from trying to enter wano!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If you choose the wrong current,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ship will be destroyed without getting anywhere close to Wano.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is a reason for Wano's closed borders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But they will open those borders...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The day "Joyboy" finally appears...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's not like I'm going to die.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So of course...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I left with a smile on my face.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because we knew, one day we would meet again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oden-san!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We missed you!!

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: TOKI- CHAN--!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: MOMONO- SURE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: HiyOR!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I missed you guys as well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Finally, we are together again...!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: You have grown so much, Momo- suke!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Yes, Father!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Huh...?! so polite!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Welcome back, scum.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Speaking of manners... WHERE ARE YOURS?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you really in the position to demand respect from us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oden- SAMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Oden- Sama!! Welcome home!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oden- Sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: This is wonderful news, TOki- SAMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I did not expect such a warm welcome.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I assumed my people would be far more critical...

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: You have toki-sama to thank for that!

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: TOKI-SAMA is incredible...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As soon as she was able, she assisted the villagers in any way possible!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She never used her role as your wife to her advantage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyday, she toiled with everyone while talking about your adventures!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Toki-SAMA and your children are the most popular people in the whole country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's all thanks to them...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one speaks about your past actions anymore!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 52 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
